description: Pokemon TCG MCP server: PSA grading, collection management, and multi-provider pricing.
name: io.github.seanlok/tcg-mcp

environmentVariables.description: PSA Public API bearer token. Get one at https://www.psacard.com/publicapi. If unset, PSA tools are disabled but other tools (Pokemon TCG API, collection, watchlist) still work.
environmentVariables.name: PSA_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Pokemon TCG API key (optional). Without it the provider still works at a lower rate limit. Free key: https://dev.pokemontcg.io/
environmentVariables.name: POKEMONTCG_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: PriceCharting API token (paid subscription required). Enables graded-card pricing.
environmentVariables.name: PRICECHARTING_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Where to put the local SQLite database. Default: ~/.tcg-mcp/tcg.db
environmentVariables.name: TCG_DB_PATH

title: TCG MCP
